name: sound_quality
description: The audio output performance and clarity of the device.
examples: sounds like im in a fishtank

name: microphone_quality
description: The clarity and performance of the input audio captured by the device.
examples: sounding like that one kid in the lobby who has music blasting through their mic with the worst quality ever

name: initial_charge_state
description: The battery level of the product upon first use.
examples: They come charged all the way when you get them

name: physical_fit
description: How comfortable and secure the device feels when worn.
examples: They feel great in the ear
They doesn’t fall out of ears

name: charging_speed
description: How quickly the device regains battery power.
